author: realbarnakiss
content:
Going to plug here the 2nd post (will stop after this, not to spam too much), with more details, + OS repo link + link to PRs made on agent optimization 

Short tldr

- Had a runaway agent instance farming more Sonnet tokens on one of the iterations
- Starting to cover the key security improvements needed so that the tool becomes more resilient, received 14 issues over the weekend to the repo
- Clearly seeing why this implementation of autoresearch is different from Karpathy's solution
- Open source repo is live, if anyone wants to contribute its open for it

https://x.com/realbarnakiss/status/2038712933924921491
